name: amr-skills
description: An opinionated theory-development skill stack for the Academy of Management Review (AMR) — the Academy of Management's conceptual/theory journal that publishes NO empirical hypothesis tests (that is AMJ's lane).

plugins.name: amr-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill theory-development bundle for the Academy of Management Review (AMR), AOM's conceptual/theory journal. Theory-puzzle framing, construct clarity, propositions (not hypotheses tested), argument-logic stress-testing, contribution differentiation, conceptual figures, APA/AOM style, ScholarOne double-anonymous developmental review. NO empirical data — that is AMJ's lane.
